agents.title: Astra
agents.lead: Astra is an Agent in VALORANT and the fourth Controller added to the game.

agents.lead: Breach is an Agent in VALORANT and one of the first Initiators available to play since the Closed Beta.

weapons.title: Ares

weapons.title: Bandit
weapons.lead: The Bandit is a Sidearm in VALORANT introduced in Season 2026. It is the second weapon to be added to the standard arsenal since the game's launch.

all_infobox_fields.label: stats
all_infobox_fields.value: See here for more stats about multipliers, TTK, spread, and accuracy penalties

weapons.title: Bucky
weapons.lead: The Bucky is a Shotgun that is a primary weapon in VALORANT.

creator: Frontier
function: Air burst Fire a canister that detonates after a short distance, spraying pellets
notes: If a canister hits a target before 7.5m it will not detonate and only deal 40/20/15 damage from Head-Legs

all_infobox_fields.value: See here for more stats about multipliers, TTK, spread, and accuracy penalties
